titleStmt.title: SII 8.248: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 248. (A.R. No. 643 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu 100 7 10ṉāl Irācentira
coḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu brahmateyam śrīkulottuṅkacoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟippe
rumakkaḷ Eḻuttu Innāṭṭu neṉmalināṭṭut tirukkaḷaril Uṭaiyār muḷaittanāyaṉār koyilil tāṉattār ka
ṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilil Āśrayamāka nākaṅkuṭaiyār maṇṭaiyāḻvār Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār tiruvāla
vāyuṭaiyār Ulakuṭaiyaperumāḷ tirumeṉi kalyāṇatirumeṉiyākavum grāmamadhyasupratiṣṭhitamāka pūjaikoṇṭaru
ḷavum Innāyaṉāṟku pūjaikkum tiruvamutupaṭikkum Uṭalāka periyatevaṟku muppattoṉpatāvatu Ūrkkaṇakku karuṇā
karapiriyaṉ Aṉupokam Eḻuta sabhāviṉiyokattuk kuṭalāka Ivaṉ kāṭṭiṉa nellāl maṭakkile Ivvūrp piṭākai
tirucciṟṟampalanallūril kāvaṉūrkiḻavaṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ muḷaittāṉpakkal Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāka vilaikoṇṭa piramāṇappaṭi sarasvativatikku kiḻakku rājādhirājavāykkālukku teṟkku 5 1catirat tuṇṭattu
kaṇṭeṟu Uṭpaṭa �� + 3/80 ta Itil teṉkiḻakkaṭaiya kuḷamum karaiyum nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl nīrnilai cempā
ti Uṭpaṭa 1/80 nikki 3 10 4 nam 6 1catirattu vaṭameṟkaṭaiya nilam pa Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya 1/40 + 1/160 ki 1/320 x 1/2 sam Āka nilam
nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭumāviṉāl tarappaṭi maṭakku 1/160 Immaṭakku nilam Araikkā
ṇiyum Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉamutal Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku candrādityavaraiyum Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom Immaṭakkunilam A
raikkāṇiyum Inniyokappaṭiye kalveṭṭikkoḷḷappaṇṇuka veṉṟu Eḻuti Ūrkkaṇakku karuṇāka
rapriyaṉum peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭatu .
Digital edition of SII 8.248 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
